hook: AI gave me a 6-step bullet list when I just needed someone to think out loud with me.
caption:
AI gave me a 6-step bullet list when I just needed someone to think out loud with me.

I asked ChatGPT to help me work through a hard decision.

It gave me:
✅ Step 1: Define your values
✅ Step 2: List the pros and cons
✅ Step 3: Consider your long-term goals

Bro. I KNOW. I just needed to process.

Here's the thing nobody talks about — AI defaults to "helper mode" every single time. Structured. Efficient. Tidy.

But some people don't think in steps. They think by talking in circles until something clicks. They need the AI to sit in the mess with them, not hand them a framework and call it a day.

That's not a bug in how you think. That's a style.

We call it the Processor. And when an AI actually knows you're a Processor, the response looks completely different — more conversational, less instructional, follows your thread instead of redirecting it.

The AI didn't fail you. It just didn't know you.

That's the whole problem BootFile exists to fix.
